these-two-mixtures-are.description:
Hitkalelut ZON de Keter of the Guf under
Malchut de Rosh in the place of Ohr Keter de Guf, and the Hitkalelut
Ohr Keter of the Guf in Kli Malchut itself.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

things-are-done-gradually.description:
in Hitpashtut de AK there is still no
recognition through the Histalkut.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

they-are-those.description:
The first is the Hitpashtut of the Ohr for the first
time.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

they-expanded-in\nthe-following-manner.concept:
They expanded in
the following manner
they-expanded-in\nthe-following-manner.description:
Ohr Hochma entered the Kli of Keter; Ohr
Bina entered the Kli of Hochma etc.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

we-have-a-great-rule-in\nour-hands.concept:
We have a great rule in
our hands
we-have-a-great-rule-in\nour-hands.description: the Elyon is greater than everything below it.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-are-two-things-to-discern-here.concept: There are two things to discern here
there-are-two-things-to-discern-here.description:
A – Why has the order been
reversed here from what it was in Hitpashtut Aleph? There the Ohr
came into Malchut first, and here it began to expand in Keter first.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-is-yet-another-profundity-here.concept: There is yet another profundity here
there-is-yet-another-profundity-here.description:
In fact, the Behinat Bina is
discerned as the Achoraim to the Hochma from the Shoresh of the Ohr
Yashar.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

the-meaning-of-panim-and-achor-de-kelim-.concept: The meaning of Panim and Achor de Kelim is simple
the-meaning-of-panim-and-achor-de-kelim-.description:
the place of
bestowal in it is called Panim, and that Behina through which it does
not bestow is called Achor.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

kli-de-hochma-into-two-partzufim.concept: Kli de Hochma into two Partzufim
kli-de-hochma-into-two-partzufim.description:
Partzuf GAR, where the Panim
remain in their place, and Partzuf VAK de Hochma, which turned its
Panim backward, giving Ohr VAK that lacks GAR.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

he-explains-the-reason.description:
“because of the Hesed there” so that he may
correct the Hesed and lower it to his Kli (see Ohr Pnimi item 41).
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

behinot.description:
Hey Hassadim in the Hey
Ktzavot from Hesed to Hod, and the second is since they are five
Gevurot, meaning in the Kli de Yesod.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-is-a-great\nhidush-to-discern.concept:
There is a great
Hidush to discern
there-is-a-great\nhidush-to-discern.description:
the Nekeva is more important than her Zachar since
the Zachar is resultant from the Zivug Zachar and Nekeva de Kli de
Hochma when the Zachar is in Behinat Harkanat Rosh (see the Rav’s
words item 35).
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

now-there-are-several-behinot.description:
The first is the unending craving
of the Ohr of the Tachton to cleave to the Elyon.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

it-is-so-for-two-reasons.concept: It is so for two reasons
it-is-so-for-two-reasons.description:
A – because of the distancing of the Ohr
from there, which induces darkness to it.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-is-yet-another-reason.description:
The Ohr of Behinat Keter remained
above since it never again entered these Kelim, but only remained
at the end of these Yod Shorashim or Orot above.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

here-there-is\nalso-a-first-question.concept:
Here there is
also a first question
here-there-is\nalso-a-first-question.description:
How will a Zachar be turned into a Nekeva?
Know, that this is why ZON in Bina had to mate and educe one
Hey in its mold.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

we-have-a-great-rule-in-our\nhands.concept:
We have a great rule in our
hands
we-have-a-great-rule-in-our\nhands.description: the Elyon is greater than everything below it.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

this-is-because-there-is-one-reason-for-.concept: This is because there is one reason for both
this-is-because-there-is-one-reason-for-.description:
Since the Ohr that remains in the Rosh cannot expand to the Guf by
itself.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

orot-and-their-incorporation-in-zon-de-k.concept: Orot and their incorporation in ZON de Keter
orot-and-their-incorporation-in-zon-de-k.description:
The first,
when they rise and incorporate in the Nukva de Keter, the second,
when they incorporate in the Dechura de Keter, and the third is when
some incorporate in the Nukva, and some in the Dechura.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

he\nmentions-three-general-kinds-there.concept:
He
mentions three general kinds there
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

he-says.description:
“Know, that all
these Kelim did not gain Aviut and become Kelim only after the
Histalkut of Ohr Malchut.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

they-make-two-zivugim.description:
The first is on the common Aviut from
Behina Dalet de Hitlabshut with Behina Gimel de Hamshacha.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

two-zivugim.description:
1 – The Hitkalelut of the Nekeva in the Zachar and the
Koma that extends in the measure of the Zachar; 2 – The Hitkalelut of
the Zachar in the Nekeva and the Koma extended in the measure of
the Nekeva.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

the-hey-de-yh-is-filled-with-yod-like-th.concept: The Hey de YH is filled with Yod like this
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

they-were-gathered-from-many-behinot.concept: They were gathered from many Behinot
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-are-two-behinot-of-inversion-of-th.concept: There are two Behinot of inversion of the Panim
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

behinot-ohr-za-emanated.description:
The first relates to Partzuf
Keter, when the Orot are in their actual place, at which time ZA was
emanated by Bina, clothing in Kelim de VAK.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

this-is-so-because-it-has-two-orot.concept: This is so because it has two Orot
this-is-so-because-it-has-two-orot.description:
The first is the remains of the Ohr that Hod gave it, which is Komat
Malchut, which is Behinat Din.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

they-are-four-behinot-zon.description:
ZON de Kli Keter, ZON de Kli Hochma,
ZON de Kli Bina, and ZON de Kli de Yesod and Malchut.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

these-are-five-orot.description:
ZON de Hochma, Bina, and the Ohr Hesed that
contains ZAT, which are all included in ZON de Keter.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-are-two-orot-in-yesod.concept: There are two Orot in Yesod
there-are-two-orot-in-yesod.description:
One is the Behinat Truncated Vav,
extending from Zivug ZON de Bina, and the other is the Behinat Ohr
Malchut.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

two-komot.description: nearly Komat Keter and Komat Hochma, called ZON.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

two-behinot-orot-are-contained-in-each-r.concept: Two Behinot Orot are contained in each Reshimo
two-behinot-orot-are-contained-in-each-r.description:
the first is a residue
of Ohr Yashar; the second is a residue of Ohr Hozer that a residue of
Ohr Yashar is clothed in it.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

it\ncan-be-depicted-in-three-ways.concept:
It
can be depicted in three ways
it\ncan-be-depicted-in-three-ways.description:
• Either they are both without Kelim, meaning ZON that rise to the
Rosh and incorporate there in both Zivugim;
• or they are both in two Kelim, meaning in Hitpashtut Bet when
ZON are incorporated there in He’arat Keter and Hochma when
they are in two Kelim de Behinat Keter;
• or in the second Behina of Hitpashtut, called Partzuf Bina de AK,
where ZON de Keter have only one Kli there and receive He’arah
from each other.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-are-three-kinds-of-generality.concept: There are three kinds of Generality
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

eser-sefirot-de-rosh-are-divided-into-tw.concept: Eser Sefirot de Rosh are divided into two Behinot
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

behinot-avi.description:
the Inner AVI, Upper AVI, and
YESHSUT.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

ak-was-thus.description:
its first three are AB – Keter, SAG
- Hochma and Bina.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

for-that-reason-two-zivugim-were-made-on.concept: For that reason two Zivugim were made on them
for-that-reason-two-zivugim-were-made-on.description:
the first in Komat
Hochma, and the second in Komat Bina, and they are called ZON.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

tzimtzum-in-ein\nsof.description:
He brought all the Ohr that expanded in the Pnimiut of this

AK from the place of its Tabur down, above the place of the Tabur
into its Upper half of the Guf.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

orot-from-tabur-de-ak-down-are-two-partz.concept: Orot from Tabur de AK down are two Partzufim
orot-from-tabur-de-ak-down-are-two-partz.description:
the Inner
AK, and SAG de AK.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

the-three-sefirot.description:
Bina, ZA, and Malchut below Tabur went
completely outside the Partzuf and Behinat Atzilut of the Partzuf was
completely canceled in them.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

avi.description:
each were divided
into two - Abba and Israel Saba; Bina and Tvuna.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

it-is-divided-into-two-behinot.concept: It is divided into two Behinot
it-is-divided-into-two-behinot.description:
GE to
Behinat Rosh, and AHP to Behinat Sof.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

this-zivug-was-made-by-two-partzufim.concept: This Zivug was made by two Partzufim
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

it-turns-out-that-this-new-ohr-fissures-.concept: It turns out that this new Ohr fissures twice
it-turns-out-that-this-new-ohr-fissures-.description:
once through the Parsa and a second time through the walls of the
Kelim of AK.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

fissures-twice.description:
once through the Parsa and a second time through
the walls of the Kelim of AK.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

ten-nekudot-are-they.description:
the first three among them take Ohr from
what extends from the Histaklut Ayin in AHP, from their place to
the place of the joining of Shibolet ha Zakan.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

reshimot.description:
Behina Dalet de Hitlabshut and
Behina Gimel de Hamshacha.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-they-extend-two-komot.description:
the first Koma on the measure of the
Zachar, and the second Koma on the measure of the Nekeva.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-are-four-divisions-that-you-find-h.concept: There are four divisions that you find here
there-are-four-divisions-that-you-find-h.description:
Keter, Hochma Bina Daat,
Hesed Gevura Tifferet, Netzah Hod Yesod.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

baal-hasulam.description:
This is
perplexing since there was no Tikun Kavim in VAK, but here he gives
an example from ZA de Atzilut and NHY de AA].
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

these-are-the-three-places-of-zivug.concept: These are the three places of Zivug
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

sof-de-nhy-de-ak-are-divided-thus.concept: Sof de NHY de AK are divided thus
sof-de-nhy-de-ak-are-divided-thus.description:
the Rosh in
them is Behinat AHP that actually returned to the Rosh, the Toch in
them is Behinat GAR de Hey Ktzavot, meaning HGT, and the Sof in
them are VAK de VAK, being ZA and Malchut de Hey Ktzavot.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

one-might-ask.description:
Since AHP returned to the Rosh and became one with
the Galgalta ve Eynaim in it, the Hotem Peh, which are Hochma and
Bina, became one with the Keter, which is Awzen.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

two-kinds-of-ohr-come-out-of-the-guf-de-.concept: Two kinds of Ohr come out of the Guf de AK
two-kinds-of-ohr-come-out-of-the-guf-de-.description:
the first from the
Tabur, and the second from the Yesod.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

sof.description:
the point of Sium of the Rosh,
is called Nikvey Eynaim, the point of Sium of the Toch, being in the
place of the previous Tabur, is called Shibolet ha Zakan, and the

Behinat Sium of the Sof, is called Parsa.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

behinat-double-masach\nfrom-two-behinot.concept:
Behinat double Masach
from two Behinot
behinat-double-masach\nfrom-two-behinot.description: Behina Bet and Behina Dalet together.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

the-nekudot-were-divided-into-three-part.concept: The Nekudot were divided into three parts
the-nekudot-were-divided-into-three-part.description:
By the three Orot Bina, ZA and Malchut that shine in Nekudim (see
Ohr Pnimi item 23).
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

in-the-first-two-nekudot.description:
Kamatz, Patach, there was no
breaking, as they are Keter and Hochma.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

this\nis-its-matter.description:
It is known that there were ten Nekudim first, where the first three
did not break, and the Kelim and the Orot remained, but the seven

lower Nekudot broke and the Kelim descended to Beria.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

nekudot.description:
there is an upper Behina from Behinat Atik in each of the
seven Nekudot, and there is a second Behina of AA in each of the
seven Nekudot as well.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

meaning.description:
Partzuf Keter, called Atik, has Eser Sefirot called Inner
HaVaYaH.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

let-us-make-an-allegory-such\nas-this.concept:
Let us make an allegory such
as this
let-us-make-an-allegory-such\nas-this.description:
it is as if water and wine, oil, honey and milk were all
mixed together in the same pot.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

the-three-sefirot-de-rosh.description:
Awzen, Hotem, Peh, which came out of the
degree of the first Rosh, consist of two Roshim, since they are below
its Masach.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

it-is-said-that-there-are-nine-nekudot.concept: It is said that there are nine Nekudot
it-is-said-that-there-are-nine-nekudot.description:
Kamatz, Patach,
Tzere, Segol, Shva, Holam, Shuruk, Hirik, Kubutz.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

behina-dalet.description:
the first is Partzuf Galgalta de AK, whose level reaches
Keter, and the second is Partzuf Nekudim de AK, which are MA and
BON.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

we-might-therefore-ask.description:
“How were GAR de Nekudim divided into
two Roshim, GE, being Keter, and AHP, being HB, as it is known that
the Lower Hey is in the Eynaim and the YHV in AHP?”
We must remember that after the Reshimot rose to Zivug in the Nikvey
Eynaim de Rosh SAG, they were incorporated in the Zivug de Rosh,
and their Aviut was renewed.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

heyin.description:
the
First Hey and the Lower Hey, that association remains fixed and
existing in Nikvey Eynaim.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

reshimot-rose-from-the-two\nheyin.concept:
Reshimot rose from the two
Heyin
reshimot-rose-from-the-two\nheyin.description: the First Hey, and the lower Hey.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-are-three-degrees-in-this-step.concept: There are three degrees in this step
there-are-three-degrees-in-this-step.description:
the first in
Nikvey Eynaim de Rosh de SAG; the second, in Nikvey Eynaim of
YESHSUT, being the place of the Tabur; the third, in Nikvey Eynaim
de Keter de Nekudim.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

we-must-also-ask.description:
what happens with the Reshimot de Taamim de SAG
that remained after the Histalkut of these Orot? After all, all the Orot
de Guf depart and rise to their Maatzil because of the Hizdakchut of
the Masach.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

this-we-must-understand.description:
why is the Ohr from Behinat Eynaim, being
Ne’etzal from Partzuf SAG, swallowed and mingled in Akudim de
SAG and is unapparent whatsoever through the Tabur? After all, any
Partzuf Tachton clothes the Elyon above Tabur too.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

we\nwill-mention-just-a-few.concept:
We
will mention just a few
we\nwill-mention-just-a-few.description:
The primary factor in the birth of a Partzuf is the Hizdakchut of the
Masach until it equalizes with the Maatzil.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

behinot\nreshimot-from-two-separate-part.concept:
Behinot
Reshimot from two separate Partzufim
behinot\nreshimot-from-two-separate-part.description:
the first is the Reshimot that
remain from the ZON de Partzuf Galgalta de AK.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

zivugim-came-out-on\nthem.description:
the first on its own Reshimot, from which the Ohr Eynaim that
expanded to Tabur came out (here item 22).
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

partzuf-sag-de-ak-is-divided-into-two\np.concept:
Partzuf SAG de AK is divided into two
Partzufim
partzuf-sag-de-ak-is-divided-into-two\np.description:
the Elyon through Tabur, and the Tachton from Tabur
down.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

sag-de\nak-had-to-come-out-in-two-partzu.concept:
SAG de
AK had to come out in two Partzufim
sag-de\nak-had-to-come-out-in-two-partzu.description:
Partzuf GAR from Peh de SAG
to Tabur, not incorporated with the lower Hey, and Partzuf VAK from
Tabur down, incorporated in the lower Hey.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

thus-we-have-before-us-ten-operations.concept: Thus we have before us ten operations
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

thus-there-are-fourteen-operations-befor.concept: Thus there are fourteen operations before us
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

roshim-were-erected\nhere.description:
Rosh Aleph, where the two Heyin are connected to each other
permanently, which can never be separated.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

they-clothe-the-three-upper-prakin-de-nh.concept: They clothe the three Upper Prakin de NHY de AK
they-clothe-the-three-upper-prakin-de-nh.description:
Hochma on
Perek Elyon de Netzah; Bina on Perek Elyon de Hod; Daat on Perek
Elyon de Yesod.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

let-us-briefly-explain-them-in-an-orderl.concept: Let us briefly explain them in an orderly manner
let-us-briefly-explain-them-in-an-orderl.description:
Because of the Hitpashtut of the lower nine of SAG below Tabur de
AK ha Pnimi, illuminating to the Kelim de NHY de AK ha Pnimi, the
two Heyin became cohesive and connected.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

zivugim-were-made-there.description:
one for the Zachar, and
one for the Nekeva.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

baal\nhasulam.description: in that] in Peh de SAG and ending in Tabur.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

behinot\ndiscerned-in-rosh-ha-bet.concept:
Behinot
discerned in Rosh ha Bet
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

taamim-and\nnekudot-of-sag-extend-from-o.concept:
Taamim and
Nekudot of SAG extend from one Rosh
taamim-and\nnekudot-of-sag-extend-from-o.description:
the Taamim are Keter de Guf
SAG and the Nekudot are the lower nine of that Guf.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

shorashim-to-the-olamot.description:
the
Yod is the first Shoresh, made in the first Tzimtzum only on the point
of Malchut, and the Aleph is the second Shoresh, made in Tzimtzum
Bet on the two points Bina and Malchut together.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-are-three-behinot-in-that.concept: There are three Behinot in that
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

nekudim.description:
Hevel ha Tabur, Hevel ha Yesod,
and Hevel de Tzipornaim of the Raglaim.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

bya.description:
Beria from Bina, Yetzira from
ZA and Assiya from Malchut.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

two-kinds-of-orot.description: the lower nine de SAG, and ZON de AK ha Pnimi.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

two-kinds-of-zivugim.description:
• The first Zivug was by the ascent of the Masach and the Reshimot
to the Rosh de SAG to Nikvey Eynaim, from which came the
Behinat Katnut de Nekudim.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

masach-consists-of-reshimot-of-two-partz.concept: Masach consists of Reshimot of two Partzufim
masach-consists-of-reshimot-of-two-partz.description:
its
own Partzuf, and Partzuf Galgalta de AK.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-are-three-behinot-in-dikna.concept: There are three Behinot in Dikna
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-are-two-behinot-there-too.concept: There are two Behinot there too
there-are-two-behinot-there-too.description:
HGT, considered GAR de VAK,
and NHY, which are the ZON de VAK.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

the-second.description:
there is a concealment force in her, over the lower Hey in
the Nikvey Eynaim de Rosh ha Aleph, so that it does not manifest its
force during the descent of the lower Hey to her place.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

two-fissures.description:
• The first whereby the Zivug of AB and SAG a new Ohr descended
and fissured the Parsa, meaning lowered the lower Hey from
there and the Gevul was canceled.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-are-three-points-of-sium.concept: There are three points of Sium
there-are-three-points-of-sium.description:
the point of Tabur ends the KHB; the
point of Yesod ends on ZA; the points of Sium Raglin are the force of
Sium of Malchut.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

second.description:
a new Gevul of the Sium of the Kav de Ein Sof that rose from
Malchut de NHY de AK, and the emergence of the three Sefirot Bina,
ZA and Malchut de NHY de AK below the point of Tzimtzum.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

third.description:
these three Sefirot below the point of Tzimtzum became the
place for the three Olamot BYA: Olam Beria in the place of Bina,
Olam Yetzira in the place of ZA, and Olam Assiya in the place of
Malchut.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

two.description:
they return and make two Zivugim there in Chazeh de
AB, like their attribute that they made in the Rosh.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

guf.description:
the Chazeh, the Tabur, and the Sium de Guf,
meaning Sium Tifferet de AK.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

all-of-them-contain-zachar-and-nekeva.concept: All of them contain Zachar and Nekeva
all-of-them-contain-zachar-and-nekeva.description:
the Komat Zachar is up to
Bina, and the Komat Nekeva is up to ZA.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

the-masach-causes-two-actions.description:
Zivug de Hakaa and raising Ohr
Hozer.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

three-actions-stem-from-the-zivug-in-the.concept: Three actions stem from the Zivug in the Chazeh
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

havayah-de-sag-for\ntwo-reasons.concept:
HaVaYaH de SAG for
two reasons
havayah-de-sag-for\ntwo-reasons.description:
One, because there is Ohr Zachar there, which came out
on Behina Bet de Hitlabshut, called YESHSUT (see Part 6, Ohr Pnimi
item 14), and Komat YESHSUT is called HaVaYaH de SAG.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

a-more-elaborate-matter-is-this.concept: A more elaborate matter is this
a-more-elaborate-matter-is-this.description:
We have learned that from these
Melachim, the suitable Behinot were sorted for Atik, AA, and AVI
de Atzilut.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

we-might-ask-about-that.description:
Since both lack GAR, what then is the
greatness of AVI over ZON? The Rav has already explained that to us
above (Part 6 items 21-25).
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

written-aside-in\nthe-manuscript-of-the-.concept:
Written aside in
the manuscript of the author
written-aside-in\nthe-manuscript-of-the-.description:
“Count” means wisdom; “Extra” means
adding, by way of “All who adds, subtracts.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

written-aside-in-the-manuscript-of-the-a.concept: Written aside in the manuscript of the author
written-aside-in-the-manuscript-of-the-a.description:
and the Partzuf Elyon of the twelve departs, which is Ein Sof and

Keter] and are left only in the eleven.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

written-aside-in-the-manuscript\nof-the-.concept:
Written aside in the manuscript
of the author
written-aside-in-the-manuscript\nof-the-.description:
eleven because they cancel and break and fall to the
authority of the Klipot.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

this-is-their-arrangement.description: the worst is both being Achor be Achor.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

eynaim.description:
1 – The Masach that was
erected in the Eynaim, because of which Bina came down to the
Behinat restricted Malchut, in which there was a Zivug de Hakaa in
the Rosh and in which the Partzuf ended, meaning in Sefirat Bina de
NHY.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-are-four-divisions-in-the-eynaim.concept: There are four divisions in the Eynaim
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

it-is-simple.description:
the Achoraim de AVI did not stop descending until the
end of the breaking of the seven Kelim.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

zivug-de-panim-be-panim.description:
The
first is Achor be Achor, meaning the state of AVI de Nekudim in the
beginning.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

it-is-not-more-than-hassadim-and-gevurot.concept: It is not more than Hassadim and Gevurot
it-is-not-more-than-hassadim-and-gevurot.description:
the ZA in it
are in the form of Hey Hassadim, and the Nukva in it is in the form of
Hey Gevurot.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

sefirat\n\nbina-is-considered-two-behino.concept:
Sefirat

Bina is considered two Behinot
sefirat\n\nbina-is-considered-two-behino.description:
the first is called Upper Bina, and the
second is called Tvuna.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

bina-de-ohr-yashar.description:
the first is
before she emanated to ZON, when she is in Ohr de Hassadim and her
Achoraim to Hochma, and the second is after she had emanated to
ZON.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

this-is-the-actual-matter-of-the\ndivisi.concept:
This is the actual matter of the
division of Bina
this-is-the-actual-matter-of-the\ndivisi.description:
from the Chazeh up it is Behinat Upper Ima, whose
Achoraim are toward Hochma, as she chooses Hassadim in the form
of, “because He delighteth in mercy”; and from the Chazeh down it is
in Behinat Tvuna, whose Panim is toward Hochma and she has
He’arat Hochma.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

kelim.description:
Daat, Hesed, Gevura, and Tifferet, fell to KHBD
de Beria, which are GAR of Beria like the Kelim DHGT that were the
GAR of ZON.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

all-the-reshimot-of-the-kelim-fell-simil.concept: All the Reshimot of the Kelim fell similarly
all-the-reshimot-of-the-kelim-fell-simil.description:
the Reshimo de Daat in
Malchut de Atzilut, meaning below everyone at the Sium of the Atzilut.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-is-also-a-second-tikun.concept: There is also a second Tikun
there-is-also-a-second-tikun.description:
The GAR came out and were
corrected through Kavim, which is not so in ZAT that emerged one
atop the other and were not connected.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

zivugim-there.description:
One for the Katnut de Nekudim from which AVI emerged in the form

of Achor be Achor, and a second for the purpose of Gadlut de
Nekudim from which AVI obtained their GAR (Part 6, Ohr Pnimi item
14, par.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

zon-in-the\nolamot-there-were-also-three.concept:
ZON in the
Olamot there were also three partners
zon-in-the\nolamot-there-were-also-three.description:
AK ha Pnimi, and AVI de
Nekudim.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

first-hey.description:
the first is the First Hey that was mixed
with the Dinim de Hey Tata’a; this is Behinat Weak Dinim.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

three-partzufim-came-out-in-nekudim.concept: Three Partzufim came out in Nekudim
three-partzufim-came-out-in-nekudim.description:
AVI in four Komot, whose
Gufim are Daat, Hesed, Gevura, and the upper third of Tifferet until
the Chazeh.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

orot-are-divided-by-two\ndiscernments.concept:
Orot are divided by two
discernments
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

three-partzufim-emerged\nfrom-ak-in-the-.concept:
Three Partzufim emerged
from AK in the beginning
three-partzufim-emerged\nfrom-ak-in-the-.description:
AB, SAG, MA, and BON, until AVI de
Nekudim, that were Achor be Achor.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-are-two-things-you-must-learn-here.concept: There are two things you must learn here
there-are-two-things-you-must-learn-here.description:
• That the two above Zivugim, Katnut and Gadlut, contradict one
another though they are both resultants of the same cause, being
the Hizdakchut Masach de SAG that raised the two kinds of
Reshimot to the Zivug.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

komat-keter\nthat-clothed-in-melech-ha-d.concept:
Komat Keter
that clothed in Melech ha Daat
komat-keter\nthat-clothed-in-melech-ha-d.description:
the ninth - the Histalkut Ohr, and the
tenth - the death of the Kli and its fall to BYA.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

hey-partzufim-de-hassadim.description:
the first, to measure the Koma, resulting from the above thirteenth
operation, and this is the fourteenth operation.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

komat-hochma.description: the 23rd, which is a new cause for Komat Bina.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

zivug-de-komat-bina.description:
it causes Komat ZA, which is the 74th
operation.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

five-operations-stem-from-these-three-op.concept: Five operations stem from these three operations
five-operations-stem-from-these-three-op.description:
from the 96th
operation, which is the new Kli de Tifferet, stems the descent of the
Reshimo to the new Kli de Tifferet, and this is the 99th operation.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

kli-de-tifferet-that-has-been-made.concept: Kli de Tifferet that has been made
kli-de-tifferet-that-has-been-made.description:
the first is the
descent of the Reshimo de Yesod to the Kli de Tifferet, which is the
102nd operation, and the second is the descent of the Reshimo de
Malchut to this Kli de Tifferet, being the 103rd operation.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

two-operations-stem-from-the-new-ohr.concept: Two operations stem from the new Ohr
two-operations-stem-from-the-new-ohr.description:
it illuminated through the
Tabur to the Keter and lowered the Hey Tata’a from the Eynaim,
returned AVI to the Rosh, and brought them in a Zivug Panim be
Achor.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

two-operations-stem-from-the-eighth-oper.concept: Two operations stem from the eighth operation
two-operations-stem-from-the-eighth-oper.description:
The first is Histalkut
Ohr from the Kli de Daat, being the ninth operation, and the second is
the fall to BYA, which is the tenth operation.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

zivug-de-komat-keter.description:
that which measures the
height of Komat Hochma, which is the fourteenth operation, and the
second extends He’arat Hochma from this Koma.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

zivug.description:
the first, which measures for Komat Bina,
being the 23rd operation, and the second, which extends He’arat
Hochma from this Koma, which is the 24th operation.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

three-other-operations-stem-from-them.concept: Three other operations stem from them
three-other-operations-stem-from-them.description:
From the 49th operation stems
the descent of the Kli de Daat to Malchut de BYA, being the 53rd
operation; from operation 50 stems the descent of Kli de Hesed to
Yesod de BYA, which is the 54th operation, and from the 51st operation
stems the descent of Kli de Gevura to NH de BYA, being the 55th
operation.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

two\noperations-are-caused-first.description:
the first is the measurement for Komat
Hochma, which is the 56th operation; and the second extends He’arat
Hochma from the Koma, and this is the 57th operation.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

written-aside-by-the-author.description:
this is where the Zivug de Katnut de Hey
Tata’a in the Eynaim comes from.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-are-two-kinds-of-ahp.concept: There are two kinds of AHP
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

atzilut-in\nthis-manner.description:
Taamim de MA is Behinat Atik Yomin; Nekudot de
MA are AA; Tagin de MA are AVI; Otiot de MA are ZON.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

there-is-a-very-important-rudiment-to-kn.concept: There is a very important rudiment to know here
there-is-a-very-important-rudiment-to-kn.description:
The Nekeva of the
above new MA, which is its Malchut, remains concealed in Rosh de

Atik.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

in-gar-de-atzilut-there-are-only\ntwo-zi.concept:
In GAR de Atzilut there are only
two Zivugim
in-gar-de-atzilut-there-are-only\ntwo-zi.description:
Zivug de Katnut, called Ibur, and Zivug de Gadlut,
though in ZA there are three Zivugim: Ibur, Yenika, Mochin.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

this-is-according-to-the-five-known-behi.concept: This is according to the five known Behinot
this-is-according-to-the-five-known-behi.description:
Komat Keter comes out
on Masach de Behina Dalet, Komat Hochma on Masach de Behina
Gimel, Komat Bina on Masach de Behina Bet, Komat ZA on Masach
de Behina Aleph, and Komat Malchut on Masach de Behinat Keter.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

metzach.description:
Not only did it divide the
Sefirot and each and every Sefira came out in its own Koma, they also
came out one below the other, until it caused ZA to come out without a
Rosh.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

from-there-downward-it-ejected-the-seven.concept: From there downward it ejected the seven Melachim
from-there-downward-it-ejected-the-seven.description:
First, Melech ha
Daat; after the Hizdakchut to Behina Gimel they ejected Melech ha
Hesed etc.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

rav-writes.description:
“This is
a great rule by which you will understand everything.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

behinot-here-in-the-zivug-de-gadlut.concept: Behinot here in the Zivug de Gadlut
behinot-here-in-the-zivug-de-gadlut.description:
Panim be Achor and Panim be Panim, because the Tachton is only
born from the Zivug Panim be Panim de Elyon.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

hence-there-are-three-zivugim-to-discern.concept: Hence there are three Zivugim to discern here
hence-there-are-three-zivugim-to-discern.description:
1 – Zivug de Katnut,
which is Achor be Achor and Ibur; 2 – Zivug de Gadlut, which is the
lowering of Hey Tata’a from the place of the Metzach, which is
Behinat Panim be Achor, since there is no Behinat Panim be Panim
but through MAN; 3 – The Zivug on the MAN that rose to the Nukva,
which is Panim be Panim.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

let-us-mention-the-things-briefly.concept: Let us mention the things briefly
let-us-mention-the-things-briefly.description:
The Masach that rose from Guf de
SAG consisted of three Behinot Reshimot: Reshimot de Taamim de
SAG (see Part 6, Histaklut Pnimit item 24).
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

they\nare-divided-into-two-behinot-in-at.concept:
They
are divided into two Behinot in Atzilut
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

in-atzilut-they-came-out-in-the-same-man.concept: In Atzilut they came out in the same manner
in-atzilut-they-came-out-in-the-same-man.description: the Big ZON related to DHGT, and the Little ZON related to TNHYM.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

this-is-because-there-are-two-behinot-in.concept: This is because there are two Behinot in them
this-is-because-there-are-two-behinot-in.description:
One – they joined to
complement AHP de Keter.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

this-is-their-order.description:
Keter de AA clothes Hesed de Atik, and Hochma to Gevura, and
Bina to Tifferet.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

the-reason-is-simple.description:
These NHY de Elyon that clothe the Mochin
in the Tachton are Behinat NHY de Eser Sefirot de Rosh de Elyon and

have no dealings with the Halbasha of the Tachton to the Guf de
Elyon.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

behinot-nhy-de-elyon.description:
the first – NHY de
Eser Sefirot de Rosh of the Elyon from its very creation.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

two-komot-extend-below-from-this-zivug.concept: Two Komot extend below from this Zivug
two-komot-extend-below-from-this-zivug.description:
the first is to the Guf de
Atik itself, because after Bina de Rosh returned Panim be Panim, its
He’arah reaches the Guf too.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

atik-gives-two-kinds-of-mochin-for-aa.concept: Atik gives two kinds of Mochin for AA
atik-gives-two-kinds-of-mochin-for-aa.description:
the first is for Rosh de AA, which are Eser Sefirot on Komat Hochma,
clothed in NHY de Atik that appeared because of this Zivug in Rosh de
Atik.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

they-became-a-place-for-the-three-olamot.concept: They became a place for the three Olamot
they-became-a-place-for-the-three-olamot.description:
Beria,
Yetzira, Assiya, in the above-mentioned two places.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

rosh-and-guf-to\nthat-lower-parzuf.concept:
Rosh and Guf to
that lower Parzuf
rosh-and-guf-to\nthat-lower-parzuf.description:
It is has already been thoroughly explained (Ohr
Pnimi item 42) that the matter of NHY de Elyon which clothe in the
Tachton, they are NHY de Eser Sefirot de Rosh, that come out in Rosh

de Elyon in the power of the Tachton’s Hitkalelut in Zivug de Rosh de
Elyon, that those additional NHY are not at all NHY de Eser Sefirot de
Elyon for they are below its Koma.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

this-is-why-rav-precisely-writes.concept: This is why Rav precisely writes
this-is-why-rav-precisely-writes.description:
“their Hitzoniut,
becomes a Levush of the Mochin of the Partzuf below it”, because the
Koma de Behina Gimel is called Hitzoniut to the Koma de Behina
Dalet, and AA took only the NHY de Behina Gimel, thus he had taken
only the Hitzoniut de NHY de Atik.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag
OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

two-behinot\nmochin-entered.description: one in NHY de Abba and one in NHY de Ima.

hassadim-and-gevurot.description:
one, this is
the first, to correct the Partzuf; two, the new ones, which extend in
every single Zivug and every single time.

upper-avi-were-made-thus.description:
Abba from the Nekeva,
Upper half of Bina de MA and Ima from the Zachar, completely
Hochma de BON.

torah.description: “Adam ha Rishon did not have anything of Olam ha Zeh.

rav\nhimself-addressed-it-and-explained-.concept:

himself addressed it and explained it thus

one rule and that will explain and settle all the mentioned articles.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

in-general-there-are-three-klipot.concept: In general there are three Klipot
in-general-there-are-three-klipot.description:
Ruach Se’arah, Anan Gadol, and Esh
Mitlakahat, which cling to Noga.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

the-rav-wrote-in-the-tree-of-life.concept: The Rav wrote in the Tree of Life
the-rav-wrote-in-the-tree-of-life.description:
“Adam ha Rishon could correct
only the Olamot Elyonim, but he did not correct Olam Assiya which is
all Klipot and this Olam remained in Behinat Achor be Achor etc.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

that-settles-a-difficult-question.description: Beria is more important than Yetzira.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

nukva.description:

ZA from the Chazeh down, and Panim be Panim with the ZA on an
equal Koma.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

this-is-the-order-of-his-hitpashtut-in-t.concept: This is the order of his Hitpashtut in them
this-is-the-order-of-his-hitpashtut-in-t.description:
The Rosh of Adam ha
Rishon was in Olam Beria, which is now the place of ZA de Atzilut
and his Garon was in the first four of Yetzira, which is now the
place of Nukva de Atzilut.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

the-olamot-rose-in-the-following-manner.concept: The Olamot rose in the following manner
the-olamot-rose-in-the-following-manner.description:
ZA rose to the place
that is now the place of AA.
sources: OceanofPDF.com Talmud Eser Sefirot Vol 2 - Rav Yehuda Leib Ashlag

zohar.description:
“Ima nests in Kursaya, ZA
nests in Yetzira and Malchut nests in the Ofan.

sages-taught.description:
Beit Shammai say: The Heavens were created first and
afterward the Earth was created, as it is stated: “In the beginning God
created the Heavens and the Earth” (Genesis 1:1), which indicates that
Heaven came first.
sources: OceanofPDF.com The Unveiling - R Ariel B Tzadok

and-beit-hillel-say.description:

Heaven after it, as it is stated: “On the day that the Lord God made Earth
and Heaven” (Genesis 2:4).
sources: OceanofPDF.com The Unveiling - R Ariel B Tzadok

but-the-rabbis-say.description:

stated: “Indeed, My hand has laid the foundation of the Earth, and My right
hand has spread out the Heavens; when I call to them, they stand up
together” (Isaiah 48:13), implying that they were created as one.
sources: OceanofPDF.com The Unveiling - R Ariel B Tzadok

in-clear-terms.description:
none of it is real!
All characters portrayed and seen in novels, television programs,
movies and online videos are fictional, are they not? And if they really do
not exist outside of the imaginations of those who contemplate them, are
they indeed worthy of interest, and all the more so an investment of
emotional energy? After all, why should one care about what happens to
this or that fictional character? After all, nothing is actually happening to
such a character, because such a character does
sources: OceanofPDF.com The Unveiling - R Ariel B Tzadok

the-great-rule-of-conquest-is-this.concept: The great rule of conquest is this

will willingly and even desirously surrender to your will, and submit to
your authority.

may live’.

let-me-ask-you-some-questions.concept: Let me ask you some questions
let-me-ask-you-some-questions.description:
What is my strife with you? Do you think
that I wish to take revenge for what you did when you were alive?”
The spirit answered that he did not think this.
sources: OceanofPDF.com The Unveiling - R Ariel B Tzadok

i-have-one-question-to-ask-you.concept: I have one question to ask you
i-have-one-question-to-ask-you.description:
tell me, does the ball of the sun revolve around the
earth, or is it stationary in the heavens, or it is suspended in the air of this world?” The spirit
answered me, “Do you wish for me to enter my head between the great mountains (meaning the souls
of the Talmudic Sages, dwelling above) so that they will crush my head? What you find written in the
books, learn.
sources: OceanofPDF.com The Unveiling - R Ariel B Tzadok
